name: Fast Fiesta Corn Nachos
recipeIngredient: 1 can Del Monte Fiesta Corn with Peppers, drained
2 cups Cheddar or Monterey Jack cheese, shredded
recipeInstructions:
1. Brown the meat in a skillet and drain. Stir in the corn and salsa.
2. Arrange the chips in a large shallow ovenproof platter or baking sheet. Spoon the meat mixture over the chips. Top with cheese.
3. Bake in a preheated 400°F oven for 2 minutes, or until the cheese is melted.
Serve with sliced green onions, tomatoes, additional salsa and sour cream.
